## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential AI-powered content strategies and solutions for Udemy to enhance their course offerings and market positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Udemy aims to leverage AI to curate and create more targeted, expert-led content for both consumer and enterprise markets](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Focus on developing AI-driven solutions for course curation, content creation, and personalized learning paths](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Explore opportunities for cohort-based learning and higher-end offerings to diversify Udemy's product lineup](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide proposals on leveraging Udemy's extensive course data and potentially create AI-focused content for the platform](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Current Challenges and Opportunities

  - [Udemy has 250,000+ courses and 98% of instructors opted into AI policies](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Need to better utilize course transcripts and data for SEO and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Aim to shift perception from affordable, promo-driven courses to higher-value offerings](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Focus on career accelerators and enterprise-level AI fluency programs](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)

### AI-Powered Content Strategies

  - [Create topic hubs and dynamically generated pages for better SEO and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Develop salary estimators and career path tools using course and market data](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Repurpose podcast content (e.g., Leading Up) into frameworks and course recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Implement AI-driven newsletter curation for millions of subscribers](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)

### Course Curation and Creation

  - [Build an AI Accelerator program with \~800 curated courses on AI fundamentals](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Develop persona-based learning paths (e.g., dev, business skills)](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=2180.0)
  - [Identify content gaps and leverage third-party data or instructor outreach to fill them](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [Explore cohort-based learning models for higher-end offerings](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=2315.0)

### Instructor and Expert Focus

  - [Highlight instructor expertise and real-world experience more prominently](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=2740.0)
  - [Consider expert-led cohorts and lightning sessions for specialized topics](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=2782.0)
  - [Curate top experts in fields like AI and research for premium offerings](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=2789.0)

### Market Positioning and Growth

  - [Drive higher ASP and deal values in enterprise accounts (UB side)](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=2857.0)
  - [Diversify focus areas beyond traditional tech courses to include business skills and AI](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=2895.0)
  - [Address changing buyer behavior and competition from free online learning resources](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=2916.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide a rough Notion doc with initial ideas by tonight (for Udemy's Disrupt Summit)](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=3025.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare two proposals:](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=3025.0)
    1.  Recommended strategy from GrowthX's perspective
    2.  Menu of options for Udemy to consider
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting in person in San Francisco after Marcel's vacation](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=3047.0)
  - [Explore potential for GrowthX team to create AI-focused content for Udemy platform](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=3524.0)
  - [Consider attending GrowthX's upcoming office launch event/happy hour](https://fathom.video/share/B5nCB3gs4-ucsPJHzyAPhUTtsXZ-mFVF?tab=summary&timestamp=3079.0)
